name: Quality of Life
author: neostryder (RPGM Tools)
description: Bundled, default-on, fully-removable quality-of-life mod. UI-level only with ZERO rules changes: it ships recommended INTERFACE-option defaults for NEW characters (show_damage, show_flavors, center_player, purple_uniques, effective_speed, notify_recharge). Existing saves are unaffected; disabling it reverts new characters to the stock table defaults. See docs/modding/QOL.md.
